name: Peanut Butter Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Beat the butter (or margarine) until creamy.
3. Add the brown and granulated sugars; beat until well blended.
4. Add the eggs, beating until smooth and light.
5. Mix in the peanut butter.
6. Combine the flour, baking soda, and salt.
7. Stir the dry ingredients into the peanut butter mixture.
8. Roll dough into small balls.
9. Place each ball on an ungreased cookie sheet.
10. Press with the back of a fork dipped in flour to form a criss-cross design (if needed).
11. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes, or until edges are slightly browned.
12. Remove from sheets and allow to cool before storing.
Makes about 120 cookies. (I make them twice as large...and usually get about 60 cookies.) These freeze well.
